logics.name: Full Confluence
logics.desc: EMA stack + MACD>signal + RSI 50-65 + near 20-day high

logics.name: Trend Pullback (confluence)
logics.desc: Strong uptrend + pullback to 20 EMA + RSI turning up

logics.name: Gap-Up & Go
logics.desc: Opens >1.2% above prior close and holds green

logics.name: RSI-60 Cross
logics.desc: RSI crosses up through 60 (momentum), not overbought

logics.name: MA20 Pullback
logics.desc: Uptrend pullback to rising 20 EMA, bullish close

logics.name: Pocket Pivot (confluence)
logics.desc: Up-volume surge off rising 50 EMA in uptrend

logics.name: Inside-Bar Breakout
logics.desc: Inside bar then close breaks its high

logics.name: MACD Bull Cross
logics.desc: MACD crosses above signal, price above 50 EMA

logics.name: Squeeze + Trend (confluence)
logics.desc: Coiled volatility inside an uptrend breaking 10-day high

note: Live signals only from strategies that backtested >=60% (target reached before stop) across the NSE universe. Accuracy is measured, not guaranteed.
